# Geotechnical Engineering — Barrie

> Geotechnical engineering services in Barrie, Canada.

## Contact
- Website: https://barrie.geotechnical-engineering.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Barrie, Canada.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
